value: same sign; p<0.05; |r|>0.3 in raw mean and AUCell/orthogonal score
role: reporting heuristic for method stability, not universal biological cutoff

value: consistent direction in available protein/cytokine/pathway readout
role: supportive evidence only; not direct TF validation

value: same sign; p<0.05; |r|>0.15 in independent bulk cohort
role: cross-platform/context screen; weaker effect-size threshold reflects bulk mixture and platform differences

value: observed |r| above 95th percentile = pass; 75th-95th = marginal/contextual; below 75th = not PBMC-specific
role: empirical specificity screen within the chosen TF universe and tissue context

value: 1,000 random TF triplets; empirical p=(k+1)/(N+1); TFs require at least 5 expressed targets
role: case-study stress test for triad-level specificity

value: 500 random matched pairs by regulon size or expression level
role: checks whether global-null classification is driven by target count or expression level

value: partial |r|>0.3 and p<0.05 after coarse cell proportions plus housekeeping mean
same sign and significance across leave-one-out subsets; report I2/tau2/Q
10,000 within-cohort disease-label permutations; observed |r| above 95th percentile
role: tests disease-group structure contribution, not TF-pair specificity

value: seeds recorded in scripts; processed scores and expected output files distributed
role: supports deterministic figure/table reproduction from processed data
